title: Mission Control: Agent Orchestration Dashboard
description: A guided tour of the Mission Control codebase — a full-stack Next.js 16 dashboard for managing AI agent fleets, tracking tasks, monitoring costs, and orchestrating multi-agent workflows.

steps.title: Welcome to Mission Control
steps.description: Mission Control is a production-grade agent orchestration dashboard built with Next.js 16, React 19, SQLite, and Zustand. It runs with zero external dependencies — just pnpm start. This view shows the full codebase: source code in src/, end-to-end tests in tests/, operations scripts in ops/, and configuration at the root.

steps.title: Next.js App Router — Pages & 66 API Routes
steps.description: Next.js App Router routes 28 panels as a SPA. The api/ directory holds 66 REST endpoints for agents, tasks, auth, sessions, webhooks, chat, and pipelines.

steps.title: UI Components — 28 Panels & Layout System
steps.description: Layout shell (NavRail, HeaderBar), 28 feature panels (tasks, agents, tokens, logs, webhooks), and a chat system. Each panel is error-isolated.

steps.title: Core Libraries — Database, Auth, Real-Time & More
steps.description: The engine room: SQLite database with migrations, auth and RBAC, WebSocket and SSE real-time layers, outbound webhooks, and a background job scheduler.

steps.title: State Management — Zustand Store
steps.description: A single Zustand store manages all client state — agents, tasks, sessions, chat, tokens, and UI preferences — with localStorage persistence.

steps.title: Security Layer — Proxy, CSRF & Access Control
steps.description: The proxy.ts middleware runs before every request, enforcing host allowlisting, CSRF origin validation on mutations, and auth requirements. Combined with rate limiting, audit logging, HMAC-signed webhooks, and Ed25519 device identity, Mission Control implements defense-in-depth security.

steps.title: Testing — Vitest & Playwright
steps.description: Unit tests use Vitest with jsdom (60% coverage threshold). End-to-end tests use Playwright with 148 tests covering auth flows, panel navigation, API endpoints, and real-time features. Run pnpm quality:gate to execute lint, typecheck, and all tests in one pass.

steps.title: The Full Picture
steps.description: Mission Control is a production-grade, full-stack agent orchestration dashboard. Key architectural patterns: event-driven SSE broadcasting, WebSocket with Ed25519 crypto handshake, RBAC with three tiers, SQLite with WAL for zero-config persistence, and a 28-panel SPA. Explore the codebase to dive deeper into any area.
